query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS translation_contributors (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, userId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE, userName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, totalSuggestions INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, approvedSuggestions INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, rejectedSuggestions INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, totalVotesReceived INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, score INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, contributorRank VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'beginner' NOT NULL, languages JSON, createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS translation_contributors (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, userId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE, userName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, totalSuggestions INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, approvedSuggestions INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, rejectedSuggestions INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, totalVotesReceived INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, score INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, contributorRank VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'beginner' NOT NULL, languages JSON, createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL);
